name: Rand Paul
subject: Fellow Conservative: new polls out. Please help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

A poll just released by Washington Post/ABC News shows nearly half of all Americans have an unfavorable view of Hillary Clinton.

The only other top-tier candidate who fares worse is the Republican establishment's "electable" pick.

Me?

That same poll - as well as a brand new Economist/YouGov survey - shows me tied for the lead with Republican primary voters.

**[Will you help spread the message that I am the Republican best positioned to defeat Hillary Clinton by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180279:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, the reason my message is resonating with voters across the country is because - outside the beltway - Americans are demanding their government abide by the Bill of Rights.

My campaign has prepared a new TV ad on my NSA showdown against President Obama's all-out assault on the Fourth Amendment.

Barack Obama's illegal NSA spying program was at the very heart of the Washington Machine's abuse of our liberties.

**[So it's critical you help me get it in front of as many voters as possible in the key states](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180279:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r)**.

As I mentioned, the American people are sick and tired of business-as-usual in Washington, D.C.

They've had enough of the flippant attitude toward our Bill of Rights.

And they're yearning for a principled leader not beholden to the Washington Machine. A leader who will stand up and fight for the American people . . .

. . .who will stand up and defend the ENTIRE Bill of Rights - every last word of it!

Fellow Conservative, that's why polls show me leading Hillary Clinton in the key swing states of Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania.

I'm the Republican best positioned to defeat her.

And today I'm asking for you to help me get this message out to as many voters as I can reach in key early states.

So please, take a moment to watch my campaign's new ad highlighting my fight against Barack Obama's illegal spying program.

**[Once you've watched it, please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help my campaign spread it far and wide](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180279:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r)**.

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180280:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180281:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180282:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180283:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180279:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180279:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180284:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180285:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28180286:27084194433:m:1:879035888:FD4E323E4FD4135A4647D06DC728D3BA:r)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Help me fight back!
body:
Within hours of announcing my campaign, the attacks began. I need your immediate help to fight back. | |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

Within hours of announcing my campaign for president, the attacks on my record began. **I need your immediate help to fight back.**

[**Will you show your support by making a critically needed contribution of $25 or more right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28188112:27090978175:m:1:877327319:D193398F8A939E87295E7B53487C17C8:r)

I am running for president to keep our nation safe and carry on the promise of America. I have the experience, judgment and will to deny the most radical regimes the most dangerous weapons. **But Friend, because of my outspoken leadership on foreign policy, those who favor President Obama's dangerous approach of "leading from behind" are determined to stop me.**

When I am president, our country will no longer be governed by weak and feckless policies that put our national security at risk. We will stand with our allies, especially Israel, and fight back against terrorism. **We will _defeat_ the enemies trying to kill us. We won't just penalize our enemies or contain them; we'll _defeat_ them.**

But in order to get there, we must accomplish a lot in the next 18 months. I launched my campaign on Monday in South Carolina, and today I'm in New Hampshire taking my message directly to voters. This campaign will certainly not be easy, but with your support we can take our nation back. [**Will you stand with me?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28188112:27090978175:m:1:877327319:D193398F8A939E87295E7B53487C17C8:r)

**Simply put, I have more experience with our national security than any other candidate.** I know the players - both friends and enemies alike. More importantly, they know me. I've been to the Middle East dozens of times, both in my capacity as a U.S. Senator and as a reserve officer in the United States Air Force. **I have spent much of my adult life as part of a team committed to defending America.**

**Politicians focus on elections. The military focuses on the mission.** If given the privilege to serve as your president, I'll focus on the mission - to defend America, protect our way of life, and leave the next generation a stronger, safer nation than we inherited.

In order to govern the country and focus on the mission, we must first win an incredibly competitive presidential race. Campaigns are extremely costly, and your donation today will ensure we have the funds to fight back against the attacks and reach voters across the nation. [**In order to run a winning campaign, I need your immediate support.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28188112:27090978175:m:1:877327319:D193398F8A939E87295E7B53487C17C8:r)

**If you agree we need a strong America, then please stand with me today.**

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **The attacks against my record have already begun, and I need your help to fight back.** I promise a hard-hitting and honest fight, but I need your immediate help to ensure we have the funds needed to do so. [**Please send whatever you can afford today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28188112:27090978175:m:1:877327319:D193398F8A939E87295E7B53487C17C8:r) Thanks, Lindsey

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28188112:27090978175:m:1:877327319:D193398F8A939E87295E7B53487C17C8:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Cory Booker
subject: Why I'm on Team Murphy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| I'm proud to endorse Patrick for the U.S. Senate. Friend -- I am excited to endorse Patrick Murphy for the U.S. Senate. **We need fresh new leadership like Patrick's to tackle this nation's challenges.** He will be a champion for working families, women, and seniors in Florida and across the country, and his long-term vision to help the middle class is exactly what we need right now. That's why I support Patrick. He can win this race -- but not without our help. Will you join me, and contribute to Patrick's campaign today? _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-06-03_b1_cb_ldnd&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-06-03_b1_cb_ldnd&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: [PETITION] Start presidential debates in the summer
body:
#
Friend -
As I have traveled around the country since launching our campaign, I've heard from countless voters about the need for vigorous debates between candidates on the issues.
The people of this country are tired of political gossip, personal attacks and ugly 30-second ads. They want the candidates to engage in serious discussions about the very serious issues facing our country today.
**In my view, the candidates for president should engage in a series of debates beginning this summer.** I asked the Democratic Party to work towards that goal this week, but **they need to hear from activists like you if it's going to become a reality.**
[**Please add your name to my letter to the Democratic Party urging debates for presidential candidates starting this summer.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2158/43f17890/5ebd5f44/621dd9be/3555598412/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/debates?source=em150603su-g")
In the long haul of a presidential campaign, candidates like myself spend a lot of time traveling to states with early primaries speaking directly to voters. But we can only be in so many places at once, and so the media ends up distilling these discussions down to soundbites for evening newscasts.
Debates change that. Candidates can take the national stage, speaking directly to voters and challenging each other to talk about solutions to the huge problems with which our country is dealing.
**It means that we can take the issues that define our campaign -- income inequality, taking on Wall Street, creating jobs -- directly to voters across the country.**
**We should not wait to start the debates.** That's why I'm asking the Democratic Party to start debates this summer. Can you ask them too?
[**Add your name to my letter asking the Democratic Party for debates this summer.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2158/43f17890/5ebd5f44/621dd9be/3555598412/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/debates?source=em150603su-g")
There's a bigger reason why we should debate early and often: more debates will encourage more people to vote, and when more people vote, Democrats win.
In 2008 voter turnout was extremely high, and an engaged and vigorous nominating process was one of the keys to success in registering voters early on. Those debates helped voters, beginning in the primary process, to understand more about the candidates and their positions on the issues. And come November, people were convinced they had a meaningful stake in the general election.
The purpose of our campaign -- and every Democratic campaign -- should be to encourage as much voter participation as possible.
And while we're at it, it can't hurt to encourage inter-party debates. I'd like to have myself and other Democratic candidates on stage with some of the Republican candidates and let the American people hear from both sides on the big issues. I think I know where they'll stand.
[**So, let's start the debates. Please add your name now:**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2158/43f17890/5ebd5f44/621dd9be/3555598412/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/debates?source=em150603su-g")
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/debates**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2158/43f17890/5ebd5f44/621dd9be/3555598412/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/debates?source=em150603su-g")
Thank you for all of your support,
Bernie

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2158/43f17890/5ebd5f44/621dd9bf/3555598412/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/summer-debates?refcode=emb150603su-g")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2158/43f17890/5ebd5f44/621dd9bc/3555598412/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2158/43f17890/5ebd5f44/621dd9bd/3555598412/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
